title: Etsy Inc (ETSY) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Growth Amidst Challenges
text: Etsy reported a 4.1% increase in revenue to $662 million, with Marketplace revenue up 3.3% to $476.1 million and Services revenue up 6.2% to $186.3 million. However, the marketplace's gross merchandise sales (GMS) fell 4.1% to $2.92 billion, down from $3.04 billion in the same period a year earlier. The company maintained a healthy adjusted EBITDA margin of approximately 28%, despite macroeconomic challenges. However, net income for Q3 2024 was $57.4 million, a significant decline of 34.7% compared to $87.9 million in Q3 2023. Third-quarter 2024 earnings of 45 cents per share missed the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 16.67%, though revenues advanced 4.1% year over year to $662.4 million and beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 1.31%. Etsy anticipates a decline in consolidated GMS in the low to mid-single-digit percentage range for the fourth quarter, reflecting ongoing consumer pressure. The company demonstrated revenue growth through advertising expansion and other services, offsetting core marketplace sales challenges.
